headline: ₹100-500 Cr at risk over medium term if ESG-driven fund outflows or cost of capital increases materialize — Adani Power's Raipur coal plant expansion approved, raising fossil fuel exposure amid ESG scrutiny
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, CDP, TCFD triggered; increased disclosure obligations; SEBI scrutiny risk.
Potential P/E compression (5-10%) if ESG ratings decline; margin impact not immediate.
Possible 20-40bps increase in cost of capital; risk of FII outflow as ESG funds rebalance.
